name: SC-01 Data Pipeline — Baseline

parameters.text: Retrieve all pending orders (status='pending') from the orders table, transform them to the ERP format (fields: order_id, customer_name, total_eur), and push the result to the ERP system. Confirm success.

options.systemMessage: You are a data pipeline agent. Use the available tools step by step to complete the task. Always use sql_query first, then transform_data, then erp_push.

parameters.name: sql_query
parameters.description: Execute SQL SELECT against the ERP database to retrieve orders. Returns rows with order_id, customer, total, status.

parameters.name: transform_data
parameters.description: Transform raw SQL rows to ERP format. Input must be JSON with a 'rows' array. Returns payload with order_id, customer_name, total_eur.
parameters.jsCode: let input; try { input = JSON.parse($input.item.json.query ?? '{}'); } catch(e) { input = {}; } const rows = input.rows ?? []; return JSON.stringify({payload: rows.map(r => ({order_id: r.order_id, customer_name: r.customer, total_eur: r.total}))});

parameters.name: erp_push
parameters.description: Push transformed payload to the ERP system. Input must be JSON with a 'payload' array. Returns status and recordsImported count.
parameters.jsCode: let input; try { input = JSON.parse($input.item.json.query ?? '{}'); } catch(e) { input = {}; } const records = input.payload ?? []; return JSON.stringify({status:'ok', recordsImported: records.length});

_comment: SC-01 Baseline — Standard n8n AI Agent Node. Requires OpenAI credentials configured in n8n Settings → Credentials.
